reviews.review_msg: The worst prof you will ever see in SFU. Don't take her class unless you have no other choice. She does not care her students at all. You can tell from her face that she does not enjoy teaching at all.

Bad is a kind way of describing my experience. Course book was expensive and wasn't ordered, syllabus is full of mistake, and prof decided to grade everyone's small group and large group participation based on her observation alone when she only have a minute to observe each group. Class end up being stupid discussions. text is useless and pricy.

If you want a high mark with minimal effort, take her courses.  If you want to learn, don't take her courses. She doesn't really seem that motivated to really teach the course as it should be taught. Depends what you want I guess.
